records.m_Talk_ENG: How... am I still alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... am I still alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... am I still alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A tree...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A tree...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A tree...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I fall on top of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I fall on top of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I fall on top of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there's no way I'm okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there's no way I'm okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there's no way I'm okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever. A broken leg instead of my life is a small price to pay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever. A broken leg instead of my life is a small price to pay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever. A broken leg instead of my life is a small price to pay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Shepherd...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Shepherd...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Shepherd...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I brought her with me without thinking, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I brought her with me without thinking, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I brought her with me without thinking, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: how am I supposed to fix her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: how am I supposed to fix her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: how am I supposed to fix her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... Shepherd's visual system memory...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... Shepherd's visual system memory...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... Shepherd's visual system memory...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sorry, Shepherd. I'm going to borrow this for a second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sorry, Shepherd. I'm going to borrow this for a second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sorry, Shepherd. I'm going to borrow this for a second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I connect the memory to the black box recorder... I might be able to find a clue on how to fix you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I connect the memory to the black box recorder... I might be able to find a clue on how to fix you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I connect the memory to the black box recorder... I might be able to find a clue on how to fix you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you wait long?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you wait long?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you wait long?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Shepherd slept well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Shepherd slept well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Shepherd slept well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even had a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even had a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even had a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For safely waiting for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For safely waiting for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For safely waiting for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd didn't do anything, but you thank Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd didn't do anything, but you thank Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd didn't do anything, but you thank Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because you are <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because you are <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because you are <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have much time, Shepherd. Can you follow me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have much time, Shepherd. Can you follow me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have much time, Shepherd. Can you follow me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. Shepherd's good at following.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. Shepherd's good at following.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. Shepherd's good at following.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But where are we going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But where are we going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But where are we going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To a place full of something I want to show you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To a place full of something I want to show you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To a place full of something I want to show you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's also someone who has been waiting for you for a long time over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's also someone who has been waiting for you for a long time over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's also someone who has been waiting for you for a long time over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A person waiting for Shepherd...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A person waiting for Shepherd...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A person waiting for Shepherd...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. As soon as you show up, I'm sure that this person will welcome you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. As soon as you show up, I'm sure that this person will welcome you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. As soon as you show up, I'm sure that this person will welcome you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit... I thought we lost them, but were we being followed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit... I thought we lost them, but were we being followed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit... I thought we lost them, but were we being followed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are people over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are people over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are people over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pointy hearts... You'll get hurt if you get close. Be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pointy hearts... You'll get hurt if you get close. Be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pointy hearts... You'll get hurt if you get close. Be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, you stay put here and wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, you stay put here and wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, you stay put here and wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be right back. And don't look this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be right back. And don't look this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be right back. And don't look this way.
